notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Jeremy Peña steals (7) 3rd base.

notableEvents.label: Yainer Diaz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yainer Diaz grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Jose Altuve out at 2nd. Yainer Diaz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yainer Diaz rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yainer Diaz grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Jose Altuve out at 2nd. Yainer Diaz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by third baseman Raynel Delgado. Andrés Giménez to 3rd. George Springer to 2nd. Nathan Lukes to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews singles on a line drive to left fielder Myles Straw.
